acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_prose_001] Pass if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155 conveys the same transition into work without naming the chapter or sounding like an essayistic aside, and the paragraph still reads as close-third narration through Owen. Fail if the replacement still summarizes the scene from outside his immediate perception.

[chapter_10_prose_002] Pass if, across the revised material at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:161, no more than two correction-template constructions remain and at least three of the marked lines now make their distinction through image, motion, or direct statement instead. Fail if correction pivots are still the dominant way the passage sounds intelligent.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155 conveys the same transition into work without naming the chapter or sounding like an essayistic aside, and the paragraph still reads as close-third narration through Owen. Fail if the replacement still summarizes the scene from outside his immediate perception.
findings.problem: The sentence 'That was the chapter's real weather' steps outside the established close third limited distance into authorial commentary. It reads like a critic summarizing the scene rather than Owen perceiving it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the sentence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155 so the shift into sustained labor is rendered through Owen's perception, the room's physical behavior, or the work itself, without referring to 'the chapter' or any external narrative frame.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, across the revised material at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:161, no more than two correction-template constructions remain and at least three of the marked lines now make their distinction through image, motion, or direct statement instead. Fail if correction pivots are still the dominant way the passage sounds intelligent.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps returning to the same corrective sentence template: not X but Y, not X exactly, more like Y. Used this often in one scene, the analytic voice starts feeling mechanically self-revising instead of freshly observant.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the distinction-making sentences anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:77, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:127, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:161. Keep the precision, but convert several of these beats into image, motion, or cleaner declarative language instead of repeating the same correction pivot.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
